title: CIS 3213 – Foundations of Cybersecurity
text: 3/29/26, 12.26 AM CIS 3213 Foundations of Cybersecurity University of South Florida CIS 3213 Foundations of Cybersecurity Credit(s): 3 The fundamentals of cyber security are introduced: Students learn to identify attack phases, understand the adversary' s motivations, the resources and techniques they use, and the intended end-game. Techniques for mitigating threats are described. Prerequisite(s): CQP 2510 (min grade C) AND CGS1540 (min grade B) Restriction(s): Majors Only https Ilcatalog usf edulpreview course_nopop php?catoid-23&coid-103436&print 1/1
